entries.reason: Cargo workspace edges are the machine-enforced capability dependency policy
entries.exit_condition: replace only with an equivalent capability dependency policy

entries.reason: Composition is the unique production location allowed to assemble shared adapters
entries.exit_condition: replace only if the deployable production root changes

entries.reason: Current Hexagonal dependency directions remain enforced until the capability-first guard replaces legacy COLA rules
entries.exit_condition: retire together with check-cola-layer-purity.sh after #1022 replacement evidence

entries.reason: Runtime application still reaches adapter-owned client accessors during production cutover
entries.exit_condition: remove when RuntimeResources and old MainRunPort production paths are cut

entries.reason: Runtime bootstrap remains in application while adapter wiring is moved to Composition
entries.exit_condition: remove when production bootstrap is available only through Composition

entries.reason: The transitional input buffer port still references application types
entries.exit_condition: remove when the old MainRunPort and transitional input path are retired

entries.reason: Legacy Runtime ports still reference application types during cutover
entries.exit_condition: delete the legacy port module after production consumers switch

entries.reason: Runtime temporarily owns impl blocks adapting shared adapter newtypes to Runtime-local ports
entries.exit_condition: remove after supplier adapters implement consumer-owned ports and Composition wires them

entries.reason: memory_store and task_store are transitional business modules and are not Storage Target structure
entries.exit_condition: remove after Task and Memory business models migrate out of Storage

entries.reason: Slash dispatch still performs asynchronous request-response work instead of Effect round-trips
entries.exit_condition: remove when slash I/O is driven through Effect and authoritative events

entries.reason: Tests, projection owners and comments are outside each narrowly stated TUI invariant
entries.exit_condition: split into narrower registered scopes when the inline TUI guard is decomposed

entries.reason: Comment examples are not runtime environment reads
entries.exit_condition: permanent while the textual scanner reads source lines

entries.reason: Test construction and the registered Runtime reflection bridge are outside the production construction rule
entries.exit_condition: remove trait_reflection scope when Runtime production cutover completes; retain test scope

entries.reason: Comments and the explicit retired-field compatibility test are not active Config ownership
entries.exit_condition: remove compatibility suppression with the retired compatibility fixture

entries.reason: The guard reports only log targets outside the registered aemeath namespace
entries.exit_condition: replace when the shell guard directly consumes TargetCatalog

entries.reason: The error logging owner is removed only for the no-self-reference sub-check
entries.exit_condition: permanent while the dedicated no-self-reference check exists

entries.reason: The invocation production ownership check excludes test fixtures
entries.exit_condition: permanent while tests use local fixtures

entries.reason: Test files and the registered display projection owner are outside the direct-model-read rule
entries.exit_condition: remove display bridge exclusion when Render bypass retirement completes

entries.reason: The production shared-run-loop ownership rule excludes test fixtures
entries.exit_condition: permanent while test fixtures model run-loop symbols

entries.reason: The single running-indicator write is the guarded intended rendering site
entries.exit_condition: remove with the legacy running indicator rule

entries.reason: TEA purity scans update/model projections, not the registered runtime and Effect executor owners
entries.exit_condition: remove entries when the runtime owners move or the guard scope changes

entries.reason: Test mocks are outside production TEA purity
entries.exit_condition: retain while these files are test-only

entries.reason: Line-local escape for a proven scanner false positive
entries.exit_condition: remove when no source line uses the marker

entries.reason: Safe text helper implementations are the owner of the operations prohibited to consumers
entries.exit_condition: replace if helper ownership changes

entries.reason: Line-local escape only for a proven non-string slice false positive
entries.exit_condition: remove when no source line uses the marker
